title: Filament Recycling Cost Comparator
description: Industrial-grade tool to compare the total cost of recycling vs. virgin filament production, incorporating material yield, energy, labor, logistics, and quality-adjusted output. Aligns with ISO 14040/14044 LCA principles and Lean/Six Sigma waste reduction metrics.

inputs.label: Recycling Machine Purchase Cost
inputs.businessContext: Capital expenditure for the recycling extruder/pelletizer system.

label_i18n.tr: Geri Dönüşüm Makinesi Satın Alma Maliyeti
label_i18n.fr: Coût d'achat de la machine de recyclage
label_i18n.es: Costo de compra de la máquina de reciclaje

businessContext_i18n.en: Capital expenditure for the recycling extruder/pelletizer system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri dönüşüm ekstrüderi/peletleyici sistemi için sermaye harcaması.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépense d'investissement pour le système d'extrusion/granulation de recyclage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gasto de capital para el sistema extrusor/pelletizador de reciclaje.

inputs.label: Machine Useful Life
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational life before major overhaul or replacement.

label_i18n.fr: Durée de vie utile de la machine

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational life before major overhaul or replacement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Büyük revizyon veya değiştirme öncesi beklenen operasyonel ömür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Betriebsdauer vor größerer Überholung oder Austausch.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de vie opérationnelle prévue avant révision majeure ou remplacement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Vida operativa esperada antes de una revisión o reemplazo importante.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Routine maintenance, spare parts, and service contracts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Routine maintenance, spare parts, and service contracts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rutin bakım, yedek parçalar ve servis sözleşmeleri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Maintenance de routine, pièces de rechange et contrats de service.
businessContext_i18n.es: Mantenimiento rutinario, repuestos y contratos de servicio.

inputs.label: Recycling Energy Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Energy required per kg of recycled filament produced.

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy required per kg of recycled filament produced.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretilen kg başına geri dönüştürülmüş filament için gereken enerji.
businessContext_i18n.de: Benötigte Energie pro kg produziertem Recycling-Filament.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie requise par kg de filament recyclé produit.
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía requerida por kg de filamento reciclado producido.

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage including benefits for operator.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage including benefits for operator.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yan haklar dahil operatör için saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire incluant les charges pour l'opérateur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario por hora incluyendo prestaciones para el operador.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per kg
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor time to process one kg of recycled filament.

label_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra por kg

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor time to process one kg of recycled filament.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir kg geri dönüştürülmüş filament işlemek için gereken doğrudan işçilik süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Arbeitszeit zur Verarbeitung von 1 kg Recycling-Filament.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de travail direct pour traiter un kg de filament recyclé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de mano de obra directa para procesar un kg de filamento reciclado.

inputs.label: Waste Collection Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost to collect and transport scrap plastic to recycling facility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to collect and transport scrap plastic to recycling facility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık plastiğin geri dönüşüm tesisine toplanması ve taşınması maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Sammlung und Transport von Kunststoffabfall zur Recyclinganlage.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de collecte et de transport des déchets plastiques vers l'installation de recyclage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de recolectar y transportar plástico de desecho a la planta de reciclaje.

rules.message: Combined yield and quality factor is very low; consider process improvement.
Energy consumption exceeds typical threshold; investigate efficiency.
Low production volume may not justify capital investment.

thresholds.message: Recycling cost exceeds 110% of virgin price; review economics.
Yield below 70% indicates significant material waste.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
